action.description:
Introduced by Senators James, Wanggaard, Tomczyk, Jacque and Roys; 
cosponsored by Representatives Dittrich, Joers, Brill, Mayadev, Ortiz-Velez, Sinicki, Miresse, O'Connor, Kreibich, Nedweski, B.
